title: pneumonanthe grandiflora
intro: Pneumonanthe grandiflora, also known as the Lungwort or Pulmonaria officinalis, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pneumonanthe grandiflora include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Pneumonanthe grandiflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
